title: <div>Since she has prior experience and is coming back after a lapse, this 4‑wee
content:
Since she has prior experience and is coming back after a lapse, this 4‑week plan assumes she mainly needs a structured refresher plus heavy practice testing.

***

## Overall structure

- Study time: 5–6 days/week, 60–90 minutes/day.
- Core pieces:
- One NY‑approved course or text (e.g., Modern Real Estate Practice in New York for Salespersons).[1][2]
- One audio resource (e.g., New York Real Estate License Exam AudioLearn or Key Point Exam Review for Modern Real Estate Practice v21.0 (MP3)).[3][4][5]
- One main practice‑test source (e.g., Barron’s Real Estate Licensing Exams or an app like Dearborn Real Estate Exam Prep or Lexawise New York Real Estate Exam Prep).[6][7][8][9][10]

***

## Week 1 – Reactivate knowledge

Goal: Re‑wake prior knowledge and update on current NY basics.

- Days 1–3:
- Read or skim core NY text units on property ownership, estates, and basic contract law (roughly first 3–4 chapters of a NY text).[13][14][1]
